title: Iranian Crude Exports Rise Lifting Its Ranking In Opec
section_path: Iranian Crude Exports Rise Lifting Its Ranking In Opec
section_path_text: Iranian Crude Exports Rise Lifting Its Ranking In Opec
summary:
Main
This insight explores Iran's recent increase in its crude/condensate exports, making it OPEC's fourth largest crude exporter in May. By Armen Azizian
Iran's crude/condensate exports accounted for 9% of OPEC's crude/condensate exports in February 2024 and again in May 2024, the highest share since August 2018. Rising crude exports mean Iran has overtaken Kuwait and Nigeria to be the fourth largest crude/condensate exporter in OPEC.
